compiled_state.title: As a DSO agent running design review, I can query WCAG 2.2 AAA compliance patterns cross-referenced to Section 508 to generate actionable accessibility guidance
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Populates plugins/dso/data/ui-reference/accessibility/ with WCAG 2.2 AAA success criteria organized by the four principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust), cross-referenced to Section 508 and OMB M-24-08. Manually updates _index.yaml.

**Why**: WCAG 2.2 AAA compliance is required for federal digital services. Design review agents need to cite specific WCAG criteria and actionable implementation patterns, not just general accessibility guidance.

**Scope**:
- IN: All four WCAG 2.2 principles' success criteria at AAA level; Section 508/OMB M-24-08 cross-references where applicable; compliance: [wcag-2.2-aaa] tag; action tags for interaction types (keyboard-nav, focus-management, color-contrast, etc.)
- OUT: WCAG 2.0/2.1 criteria not changed in 2.2; USWDS accessibility annotations (covered in Story-3)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, accessibility/ directory covers all four WCAG 2.2 principles with AAA-level success criteria; Section 508/OMB M-24-08 cross-references noted where applicable; each entry has YAML frontmatter with compliance: [wcag-2.2-aaa] and Summary + Detail tiers (Detail tier quotes the normative SC text); no entry file exceeds 500 lines
  ← Satisfies: "WCAG 2.2 AAA patterns cross-referenced to Section 508/OMB M-24-08" (SC4)

- When this story is complete, keyboard navigation entries use action: [keyboard-nav] tag; these tag values are documented in a comment at the top of the accessibility/ files (Story-6 precision query contract: "WCAG 2.2 keyboard navigation" expects compliance: [wcag-2.2-aaa] and action: [keyboard-nav])
  ← Satisfies: SC4 + Story-6 precision query contract

- When this story is complete, _index.yaml is manually updated with all new WCAG entries and committed; check-corpus-schema.sh passes on all accessibility/ files
  ← Satisfies: SC1, SC2

- When this story is complete, dso ref-query "WCAG 2.2 keyboard navigation" returns a top result with both compliance: [wcag-2.2-aaa] and action: [keyboard-nav] in its frontmatter
  ← Satisfies: SC4 + SC3

## Considerations

- [Accessibility] Detail tier must quote the normative WCAG 2.2 SC text verbatim (from w3.org/TR/WCAG22/); Summary tier provides the practical implementation note
- [Reliability] WCAG 2.2 is a W3C specification — verify acceptable license for corpus inclusion; use W3C-Document or equivalent in the license field

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
